calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: EDWARD MACK LIU FOR PLAINTIFF DING BONG LEE ALSO PRESENT
MR. PUCCININI FOR DEFENDANT LAN DIEM HONG ALSO PRESENT
JOSHUA S LEVENBERG FOR DEFENDANT MAI DANG ALSO PRESENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DANG MAI TO VACATE PREMISES AT 307 TEDDY AVENUE BY NOON 12/1/05. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $16,800. $3000 TO BE PAID AT TIME OF SIGNING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, $5000 ON 9/1/05, AND $8800 ON 12/1/05 NOON, WHEN DEFENDANT VACATES PREMISES AND RETURNS KEYS.
DEFENDANT TO LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM SWEPT AND CLEAN CONDITION, WITH NO MALICIOUS DAMAGE. PLAINITIFF WAIVES ANY CLAIMS AGAINST NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR. A MUTUAL RELEASE, PER 1542 CC, BY ALL PARTIES INCLUDING JIM WYNN AND VAN HONG. RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST WAIVED BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES RENT FOR THE NEXT 6 MONTHS. THE 3 MONEY ORDERS HELD BY MR. PUCCININI TO BE TURNED OVER TO PLAINTIFF. TERMS TO BE REDUCED TO WRITING AND SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES.
IF DEFENDANT MAI DANG DOES NOT VACATE, JUDGMENT CAN BE OBTAINED, WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE, FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL ARSHAWSKY; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER:RON SINCLAIR (218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Edward Liu, Esq. 415-781-8251 for plaintiff and opposing party Ding Bong Lee

RULING:
NO Other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT DANG MAI's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled with 5 days leave to answer. Order signed. (301/DM/EH) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR: 4819
